title: Create Militarized
description: Adds Grenades, new materials and mechanics into your Create Mod factory.
body:
## Requires create!

Create Militarized is a relatively small mod adding grenades, explosives and materials.
**New Materials:**
Uranium, steel, aluminum, cobalt, platinum, sulfur, tungsten, lead and their sheet variants.
**New Machines**
Coke furnace, supercomputer, uranium processor
**New Explosives**
HE Grenade, Dynamite, Incineary Grenade, Lava Bottle

**Common Questions:**

_How do i get the Uranium Variants?_

They are not yet implemented, current uranium is obtainable by "smelting" Uranium dust in the Uranium Processor.

_How do i craft tungsten tools?_

I dont know why JEI isn't showing the recipe but they are crafted by upgrading iron tools with tungsten in the smithing table.

**Please note that the description is accurate only to the 4.0.0 Version.**
